challenged_findings.challenge: 5 near-boundary records checked for special approval exemptions
challenged_findings.result: All 15 records have special_approval=0. No exemptions apply.

close_boundary_cases.resolution: M1/A/1n, exceeded training std 500 by 5.5%, no special approval
D1/C/3n, exceeded training std 350 by 7.3%, no special approval
M1/C/3n, exceeded training std 350 by 9.7%, no special approval
M1/A/2n, exceeded training std 500 by 8.2%, no special approval
M1/B/3n, exceeded training std 420 by 11.0%, no special approval

supporting_evidence: All 15 records: special_approval=0, status=approved (部门经理 level), expense_type=travel_lodging, reason contains '培训'
No record has 专项审批 (special approval) that would allow exceeding the standard per 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art 12
All per-night amounts computed as amount/nights and compared against training standard from 05_training_expense.md Art 5
exceptions_or_boundaries: 5 records near boundary (<¥50 excess) reviewed. No special approvals found. The fundamental issue is classification: training stays must use training lodging standard regardless of amount.
rationale: All 15 records are valid violations. Training stays classified as travel_lodging violate both 04_travel_expense.md Art 7 and 05_training_expense.md Art 6. Per-night amounts exceed the correct training lodging standard (05 Art 5), and no special approvals exist to exempt any. The 33 other records with training stays under travel_lodging that don't exceed the training standard are still classification errors but not financially material — they are properly recorded as unused_candidate_record_ids.
